valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 26 May 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Wed 27 May 2026
general_synopsis: High Rockall 1030 slow-moving, intensifying 1032 by 1800 Tuesday. New low expected FitzRoy 1019 by same time. High German Bight 1031 dissipating
